executable.title: CurvatureAD
executable.contributor: Hans J. Johnson, Jacob J. Kitzmann

double.name: conductance
double.label: conductance
double.description: The lower the value of conductance, the more strongly the filter preserves the original image's light/dark boundaries

double.name: timeStep
double.label: time step
double.description: Adjust delta t in the equation given at https://docs.itk.org/projects/doxygen/en/stable/classitk_1_1AnisotropicDiffusionFunction.html. Stable values for most 2D and 3D functions are 0.125 and 0.0625, respectively.

integer.name: iterations
integer.label: Number of iterations
integer.description: How many times to filter the image sequentially with the anisotropic diffusion filter.
